  • Comfort U-back design to keep straps in place
  • Full frame for added support
  • Full coverage for better comfort & modesty
  • Fully adjustable straps for a personalized fit

Note: To find your perfect band size, measure around your ribcage, just under your bust, keeping the tape comfortably snug. If the measurement is an even number, that’s your band size. If it's an odd number, round up to the next even number for the best fit.

Adjustable Back – With hooks, steps to free and adjust yourself comfortable in case of weight gain or loss.
Features:
  • Foam padded
  • Comfort U-back design to keep straps in place
  • Full frame for added support
  • Full coverage for better comfort & modesty
  • Fully adjustable straps for a personalized fit

Fabric: Nylon, Spandex

Note: To find your perfect band size, measure around your ribcage, just under your bust, keeping the tape comfortably snug. If the measurement is an even number, that’s your band size. If it's an odd number, round up to the next even number for the best fit.

Adjustable Back – With hooks, steps to free and adjust yourself comfortable in case of weight gain or loss.
Features:
  • Foam padded
  • Comfort U-back design to keep straps in place
  • Full frame for added support
  • Full coverage for better comfort & modesty
  • Fully adjustable straps for a personalized fit

Fabric: 75% Polyester, 25% Elastane

Note: To find your perfect band size, measure around your ribcage, just under your bust, keeping the tape comfortably snug. If the measurement is an even number, that’s your band size. If it's an odd number, round up to the next even number for the best fit.

Body (HTML):
Adjustable Back – With hooks, steps to free and adjust yourself comfortably in case of weight gain or loss.
Features:
  • Printed
  • Comfort U-back design to keep straps in place
  • Full frame for added support
  • Full coverage for better comfort & modesty
  • Fully adjustable straps for a personalized fit

Fabric: Cotton

Note: To find your perfect band size, measure around your ribcage, just under your bust, keeping the tape comfortably snug. If the measurement is an even number, that’s your band size. If it's an odd number, round up to the next even number for the best fit.

  • Coordinated Look: The trousers feature a matching contrast design to perfectly complement the jacket.

This quarter-zip sportswear set offers the perfect combination of functionality and contemporary style, making it a versatile choice for men who value both performance and aesthetics.

Title: Kid's Breathable Anti-Slip Sock Shoes
Body (HTML):
Keep your little ones comfortable and secure with these versatile sock shoes. Designed for toddlers and young children, they combine the softness of socks with the protection of shoes, making them perfect for indoor and outdoor use.

Key Features:

  • Breathable Fabric: Made from soft, stretchable knit material that ensures airflow, keeping tiny feet cool and dry.
  • Anti-Slip Sole: Durable, flexible sole provides excellent grip to prevent slips and falls, ensuring safety during playtime.
  • Easy On and Off: Sock-like design makes them simple to slip on and off, promoting independence in kids.
  • Comfortable Fit: Adapts to the natural shape of your child's feet, offering maximum comfort and freedom of movement.
  • Versatile Design: Suitable for various activities, from walking practice to active play.

These sock shoes are a perfect combination of style, comfort, and safety, designed to support your child’s growth and exploration.

Material: Polyester + Tpe

Please note: These shoes are delivered without a box.

Experience everyday comfort with a modern, coordinated look with this Women’s Co-Ord Set. Designed for ease and versatility. This co-ord set keeps you looking chic & feeling comfortable all day long.

Set Includes:

1. Tee Shirt:

    • Crew neck
    • Fade-resistant color
    • Hemmed cuffs & bottom
    • Durable stitching

    2. Trouser:

    • Elasticated waist with drawcord
    • Pintuck
    • Wide leg
    • Hemmed bottom

    Fabric: 100% Cotton, Waffle Knit

Title: Rubi Women's Bangor Cotton Bra
Body (HTML):
Adjustable Back – with three hooks, steps to free and adjust yourself comfortably in case of weight gain or loss.

Features:
  • Printed
  • Comfort U design for stay-in-place straps
  • Full frame helps provide support
  • Fully adjustable straps for a personalized fit

Fabric: Cotton

Note: To find your perfect band size, measure around your ribcage, just under your bust, keeping the tape comfortably snug. If the measurement is an even number, that’s your band size. If it's an odd number, round up to the next even number for the best fit.
